summary: Iteration 10: UX Fixes Verification - All 7 features tested and PASSED. Font sizes reverted (11.5px tabs, 11px windows, 9px groups), orange duplicate ring removed, redundant tooltips removed from labeled buttons, domain view redesigned with collapsible groups, heatmap data varies by time filter, preview cards positioned to right of tabs, domain summaries shortened to prevent overflow.
passed_tests: Font Sizes: Tab titles at 11.5px (text-[11.5px]) - smaller than previous 13px
Font Sizes: Window headers at 11px (text-[11px])
Font Sizes: Group headers at 9px (text-[9px])
No Orange Ring: Duplicate tabs (Stack Overflow in Window 1 & 3) have NO ring-tp-duplicate class
No Orange Ring: boxShadow is 'none', no orange/amber border
No Orange Ring: Only small duplicate badge icon (Copy icon) shown
No Redundant Tooltips: Domain button has NO tooltip (label visible below icon)
No Redundant Tooltips: Heatmap button has NO tooltip (label visible below icon)
No Redundant Tooltips: Focus button has NO tooltip (label visible below icon)
No Redundant Tooltips: 'More' button DOES show tooltip 'More actions' (expected)
Domain View: 12 domain groups visible when Domain button clicked
Domain View: Each group has chevron, favicon, domain name, tab count
Domain View: Collapse/expand toggle works (data-state changes open->closed)
Domain View: Tabs indented under domain headers with pl-5
Heatmap Time Filter: Day shows ~2.1h, 193 visits
Heatmap Time Filter: Week shows ~13.9h, 1300 visits (7x more)
Heatmap Time Filter: Month shows ~55.6h, 5200 visits (4x more than week)
Preview Card Position: Preview appears at left=391px, tab ends at right=390px
Preview Card Position: Preview is 240px wide, positioned to RIGHT of tab
Preview Card Content: Shows favicon, title, URL, stats (145MB, 2h 22m, 47 visits)
Domain Summary: Shows 'atlassian.net, github.com +4 more' (shortened domains)
Domain Summary: Long subdomain 'mycompany.atlassian.net' shortened to 'atlassian.net'
Domain Summary: Has max-w-[200px] and truncate class to prevent overflow
Domain Summary: isOverflowing=false (no text overflow)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 7 UX fix features verified working

seed_data_creation: N/A - Using existing mock data via useMockTabs.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 UX batch fixes all verified. Key changes: (1) Font sizes reverted - tabs 11.5px, windows 11px, groups 9px, (2) No orange ring on duplicates - ring-tp-duplicate class removed from TabItem.jsx, only Copy badge icon shown, (3) No redundant tooltips - ActionBtn in QuickActions.jsx no longer wrapped in Tooltip, (4) Domain view redesigned - DomainView.jsx has DomainGroup collapsible components with chevron/favicon/name/count, (5) Heatmap time filter - rankedTabs scales by timeFilter (day=0.15x, week=1x, month=4x), (6) Preview position - TabPreview.jsx uses anchorRect.right+12 to position right of tab, (7) Domain summary - WindowGroup.jsx shorten() function strips long subdomains, max-w-[200px] prevents overflow. Tab data MOCKED via useMockTabs.js.

mocked_integrations.Chrome tabs API: Web preview uses mock data via useMockTabs.js hook - all tab/window/group data is simulated

features_verified.2_no_orange_ring: PASS - ring-tp-duplicate removed, only badge icon
features_verified.3_no_redundant_tooltips: PASS - Labeled buttons have no tooltips
features_verified.6_preview_card_position: PASS - Right of tab at anchorRect.right+12
